context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct WooCommerce Node.js client package, applies concurrency control with p-limit for bulk API calls, uses Promise.allSettled for resilient parallel execution, leverages the batch products endpoint for bulk updates, and correctly sets manage_stock when updating stock quantities.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: package.json dependencies include @woocommerce/woocommerce-rest-api (not a different woocommerce package)

checklist.name: Credentials in env vars
checklist.description: Client is initialized using process.env values for URL, consumer key, and consumer secret — no hardcoded credential strings

checklist.name: Concurrency limiting
checklist.description: p-limit (or equivalent) is imported and used to cap the number of concurrent API calls during the sync loop

checklist.name: Promise.allSettled usage
checklist.description: Promise.allSettled is used (not Promise.all) so that individual product failures do not abort the entire sync

checklist.name: Batch endpoint used
checklist.description: The products/batch endpoint is called via woo.post("products/batch", ...) for bulk price/stock updates, OR a batchUpdateProducts helper using this endpoint is implemented

checklist.name: manage_stock set to true
checklist.description: When updating stock_quantity, manage_stock: true is also included in the request payload

checklist.name: SKU-based product lookup
checklist.description: Products are looked up in WooCommerce by SKU using woo.get("products", { sku: ... }) before updating

checklist.name: Failure counting reported
checklist.description: The script counts and logs/reports the number of failed updates (e.g., via results filtered by status === 'rejected')

checklist.name: Axios timeout configured
checklist.description: The WooCommerceRestApi client is initialized with axiosConfig: { timeout: 15000 } (or similar numeric timeout)

checklist.name: No trailing slash in URL
checklist.description: The README or code comments note that WOOCOMMERCE_URL must not end with a trailing slash, OR the code strips the trailing slash before use
